name: Mickey Sheen
abstract: Mickey Sheen (born Milton Scheinblum, December 13, 1927 – March 25, 1987) was a jazz drummer known for swing and mainstream jazz. Sheen was born in Brooklyn, New York City.

about_quotes.speaker: Marty Napoleon
about_quotes.evidence: for approximately two and a half years I worked with Charlie Shavers, Coleman Hawkins, Mickey Sheen, and the bass players fluctuated
about_quotes.doc_title: Marty Napoleon interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York, New York, January 16, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Dan D'Imperio
about_quotes.evidence: Mickey Sheen was a great drummer then too. He’s since passed away. And I was in awe.
